benefits.description: Protocol based on long-term study for controlling telomere shortening and longevity

protocol_notes: 10mg per injection every 3-4 days, 5 injections total (50mg total), 1x per year. References the Khavinson Protocol and a fifteen-year longevity study. Also mentions alternative dosing: 5-10mg 3x/week for 3 weeks, 1x/year; or 1mL of 3000mcg/mL solution 1x/day. Best administered in the morning subcutaneously.
